resources.title: CAIE 9701 Stoichiometry · equation coefficients
resources.excerpt: Balanced-equation coefficients give relative reacting amounts in moles; simplify both coefficients to obtain the mole ratio used in a calculation.

resources.title: CAIE 9701 Stoichiometry · limiting reagent
resources.excerpt: Compare available amounts using the balanced equation before identifying the reagent that limits product formation.

resources.title: CAIE 9701 Analysis · titration evidence
resources.excerpt: A titration calculation needs the balanced reaction, measured volume and concentration evidence before a bounded numerical conclusion is supported.
